# PERF-061 negative: static handler sets Cache-Control on responses, with Recovery installed
lang: go
file: PERF-061-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func BuildRouterCached() *gin.Engine {
	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(gin.Recovery())
	r.StaticFS("/assets", gin.Dir("./public", false))
	r.Use(func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.Header("Cache-Control", "public, max-age=31536000")
		c.Next()
	})
	return r
}
